text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer! Heehee! I'll always treasure it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll never let it out of my sight! Even when I'm
eating snacks or dinner!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, speaking of snacks... I could really go for
some carrot ice cream.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's get some on the way back! Heehee! Carrot
ice creeeam! ♪
